## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress and next steps for Augment Code's growth initiatives, focusing on content creation, backlinks, and Reddit marketing strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Backlinks for 5 key pages are in progress, expected to improve domain rating and rankings](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Content creation continues at 30 pieces/week, with a focus on guides and MCPs](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [New Reddit marketing strategy to be implemented, using multiple accounts for organic-seeming promotion](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [CLI launch imminent, with follow-up templates and agent marketplace in development](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Topics

### Backlink Strategy

  - [5 key pages targeted for backlink building](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Expected timeline: bulk of links to appear in 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Anticipated outcomes: improved page rankings and overall domain rating](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Content for backlinked pages being enriched with screenshots and hands-on tool reviews](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

### Content Creation and Optimization

  - [Maintaining 30 new pieces/week, focusing on guides and MCPs](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Listicle content performing well, nearing saturation](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [New keyword research underway for fresh content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Implementing a content refresh strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [Enriching older content, especially for pages receiving backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
      - [Manual process includes adding screenshots and improving overall quality](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
      - [Aim to systematize the refresh process for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

### Reddit Marketing Strategy

  - [Shifting focus to more aggressive Reddit promotion](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Plan to purchase multiple Reddit accounts for rotating, automated responses](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Considering API usage for posting, exploring ways to avoid bans](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Sylvain suggested using 20+ rotating accounts for organic-seeming promotion](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Jason to draft posts for review before using official Augment Code account](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)

### TikTok and Influencer Marketing

  - [Sylvain experimenting with manual TikTok engagement, seeing minor traffic](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Potential strategy: Pay influencers to update comments on old, high-view videos](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Previous success: Achieved \~2000 monthly website visits through this method](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

### CLI and Agent Marketplace

  - [CLI (Command Line Interface) launching imminently](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Agent marketplace and workflow listing page in development](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Design and engineering team working on directory structure](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Current focus on impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Plans to integrate with PostHog for more detailed funnel analysis](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Jason to provide a general weekly report for trend analysis](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Launch CLI and ramp up related initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Implement and monitor new Reddit marketing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Continue content creation (30/week) with focus on guides and MCPs](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Proceed with backlink building and monitor results](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Jason to gain access to PostHog for enhanced analytics](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Develop system for efficiently refreshing older content](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Draft and review posts for official Augment Code Reddit account](https://fathom.video/share/dsYiyToeU23qVgSKbvdKDeTbfGrWJZMY?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
